items.title: No Knicks received an MVP vote this season
items.author: Mike Lynch
items.body_excerpt:
No Knicks received an MVP vote this season

Media has been voting for the MVP since 1980-81

In all that time there has NEVER been an NBA champion with a roster that received zero MVP votes

The only time on record this has happened was '78 Bullets, when players picked the MVP and only voted for 1st
